Correction: System will support movies, TV shows, educational videos, but not pornographic content

Label: REQ-4 (3.1.3)

Correction: System handles the missing data from torrent sites, such as default values or error messages by providing a default value

Label: REQ-4 (3.1.3)
Issue: Does not specify the format the date
Correction: The date in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

Label: REQ-5 (3.1.3)
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if the search term is invalid or empty
Correction: The system shall display a message "Please enter a valid search term" if the search term is invalid or empty.

Label: REQ-2 (3.2.3)
Issue: does not specify details on how: the process, frequency, or conditions."The database of video hosting sites shall be automatically updated every 24 hours by downloading updates from a predefined
Correction: secure online repository using HTTPS."

Label: REQ-5 (3.2.3)
Issue: Does not specify the format of the length of the video and the date
Correction: The system shall display the length of the video in the format HH:MM:SS.

Label: REQ-5 (3.2.3)
Issue: does not specify how the system will handle missing data from hosting sites
Correction: System handles the missing data from hosting sites, such as default values or error messages by providing a default value

Label: Section 4.3
Issue: does not specify detailed interaction protocols and data formats.
Correction: The system shall use RESTful APIs for communication with external interfaces, with data exchanged in JSON format.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported screen resolutions for the user interface
Correction: The system shall support screen resolutions of 1024x768 and higher.

Label: REQ-7 (5.1)
Issue: does not specify how the system will handle more than 100 results
Correction: Clarify how the system will handle cases where more than 100 results are found, such as pagination or additional filtering options.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: does not specify total supported number of concurrent users
Correction: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: Does not specify the criteria for identifying illegal or harmful content
Correction: The system shall use a predefined list of keywords and URLs to identify and block illegal or harmful content.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: does not specify requirements for data redundancy and backup.
Correction: The system shall perform daily backups and store data redundantly across multiple locations to prevent data loss.

Label: Section 5.4
Issue: Does not specify the legal jurisdictions considered for compliance
Correction: The system shall comply with legal requirements in the United States and the European Union.

Label: Glossary
Issue: Does not define the term "BitTorrent client"
Correction: A BitTorrent client is a software application that implements the BitTorrent protocol for peer-to-peer file sharing.

Label: Glossary
Issue: does not define the term 'seed'
Correction: A complete copy of the file being made available for download.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: does not specify the maximum time for Query
Correction: Query times will take no longer than 5 seconds to any website.
